view.title: Validate explicit UC need #9

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 9 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for 'Failed SMS fallback to email'.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for 'Failed SMS fallback to email'.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the fallback mechanism for failed SMS notifications to email. However, the evidence provided does not include any API endpoints or mechanisms that demonstrate this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for a fallback to email, there is no concrete evidence confirming the implementation of this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
